question: Personal Area Network (PAN)
canonical_answer: A network that solely purchases transit/peering from other networks to participate in the Internet. comcast, at & t. ect. no peering agreements. pay tier 1 or tier 2 providers.

appears_in.title: Comptia A+ 1101 Flashcards
appears_in.answer:
- Provides communication for devices owned by a single user that work over a short distance
- Bluetooth, IR, NFC, etc.
(1.1 & 2.7)

appears_in.title: Comptia A+ 220 1101

appears_in.title: Comptia A+ Free Study Guide
appears_in.answer: A communications network made up of personal computing devices, such as computers, telephones, and personal digital assistants.

appears_in.title: Comptia A+ Material
appears_in.answer: A communications network made up of personal computing devices, such as computers, telephones, and personal digital assistants.

appears_in.title: Comptia Fundamentals Study Guide
appears_in.answer: A small‐scale network of Bluetooth‐enabled devices.
